title: Tencent Hunyuan Hy3 Free Offer Extended to August 5th, WorkBuddy and CodeBuddy Users Can Continue to Use for Free
excerpt: Tencent's Hy3 large model free trial activity has been extended. Tencent stated that after the originally scheduled two-week free trial period for Hy3 was about
content_html:
Tencent's Hy3 large model free trial activity has been extended. Tencent stated that after the originally scheduled two-week free trial period for Hy3 was about to end, it received a large number of user feedbacks requesting to continue using the service. Therefore, the company decided to extend the free trial period for WorkBuddy and CodeBuddy users, and the activity will continue until August 5th.

This extension mainly covers users of Tencent's AI office and programming related products. Developers and enterprise users can continue to experience the intelligent assistance capabilities provided by the Hy3 model. Previously, Hy3 attracted users through the free trial activity to test its application effects in code generation, development assistance, and workflow scenarios.

As AI large models gradually evolve from general Q&A to specialized productivity tools, code generation and smart office scenarios have become important areas of competition. By extending the free trial period, Tencent hopes to further expand the usage scale of Hy3 in real business environments and collect user feedback to improve the model's capabilities.

From an industry perspective, large model manufacturers are lowering the user experience threshold through free trials and developer programs, accelerating the deployment of models in high-frequency scenarios such as office work and programming. With intensified competition, model performance, usage cost, and ecosystem integration capabilities will become key factors influencing user choices.

content_html_zh:
腾讯Hy3大机型免费试用活动延长。 腾讯表示，原定的Hy3两周免费试用期即将结束后，收到了大量要求继续使用该服务的用户反馈。 因此，公司决定延长WorkBuddy和CodeBuddy用户的免费试用期，活动将持续到8月5日。

本次延伸主要覆盖腾讯AI办公及编程相关产品的用户。 开发者和企业用户可以继续体验Hy3模型提供的智能辅助能力。 此前，Hy3通过免费试用活动吸引用户测试其在代码生成、开发辅助、工作流场景等方面的应用效果。

随着AI大模型逐渐从通用问答向专业化生产力工具演变，代码生成和智能办公场景成为重要竞争领域。 腾讯希望通过延长免费试用期，进一步扩大Hy3在真实业务环境中的使用规模，并收集用户反馈来提升模型的能力。

从行业角度来看，大型模型厂商正在通过免费试用和开发者计划等方式降低用户体验门槛，加速模型在办公、编程等高频场景的部署。 随着竞争的加剧，模型性能、使用成本、生态整合能力将成为影响用户选择的关键因素。
